parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest gap comes from progressive development: one chapter lets each section alter the reader’s understanding, while the other repeatedly restates a settled premise in new emphatic packaging.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A turns an internal negotiation into a coherent arc through contrasting case reports, recurring metaphors, a clear roadmap, and a low-pressure first instruction; its appended summary unnecessarily repeats points that already landed.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B offers vivid examples and an intelligible addiction model, but repeatedly reasserts abstinence, effortless success, obedience, and drug analogies; stacked statistics, slogans, and sales assurances greatly outlast each idea’s useful development.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: A turns an internal negotiation into a coherent arc through contrasting case reports, recurring metaphors, a clear roadmap, and a low-pressure first instruction; its appended summary unnecessarily repeats points that already landed.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: B offers vivid examples and an intelligible addiction model, but repeatedly reasserts abstinence, effortless success, obedience, and drug analogies; stacked statistics, slogans, and sales assurances greatly outlast each idea’s useful development.
